meta_description: We CNC machine parts faster than anyone else. Your online quote includes real-time pricing and DFM. Parts ship in as fast as 1 day. Economy lead time options are also available.

sections.heading: Online CNC Machining Service
sections.text: Online CNC Machining Service Machined prototypes and production parts in as fast as 1 day. Request an online quote today. Get Instant Quote View Materials

sections.heading: CNC Machining Capabilities
sections.text: CNC Machining Capabilities

sections.heading: CNC Milling
sections.text: CNC Milling CNC milling is a subtractive manufacturing process that uses 3-axis milling and 5-axis indexed milling processes to cut solid plastic and metal blocks into final parts. Capabilities → Design Guidelines →

sections.heading: CNC Turning
sections.text: CNC Turning CNC turning with live tooling combines both lathe and mill capabilities to machine parts with cylindrical features from metal rod stock. Capabilities → Design Guidelines →

sections.heading: Protolabs Network
sections.text: Protolabs Network Our manufacturing network provides advanced CNC machining capabilities like tighter tolerances, volume pricing, and anodizing options. Capabilities → Design Guidelines →

sections.heading: CNC Machining Services for End-Use Parts
sections.text: CNC Machining Services for End-Use Parts Get high‑quality machined parts faster with our expanded automated CNC milling—parts ready in as fast as 4 days Get a Quote

sections.heading: CNC Machining Materials
sections.text: CNC Machining Materials Metals Aluminum Brass Copper Stainless Steel Steel Alloy Steel Mild Low Carbon Titanium Aluminum Aluminum is a popular choice for machining due to its low density, good mechanical properties, high thermal and electrical conductivity, and resistance to corrosion. Aluminum alloys, such as 6061-T651, 7075-T651, and 2024-T351, are commonly used in CNC machining because they offer a good balance of strength, machinability, and cost. Brass Brass is an alloying consisting of both copper and zinc. The gold materials is a weather- and corrosion- resistant metal with tensile strength similar to mild steel. It's also an easy to machine material, so feedrates can remain high and...

sections.heading: ABS
sections.text: ABS Acetal CPVC Delrin HDPE Nylon PEEK PEI PET PMMA (Acrylic) Polycarbonate Polypropylene PPSU PSU PTFE PVC ABS ABS is a low-cost engineering plastic that is easy to machine. ABS is an ideal material for structural applications when impact resistance, strength, and stiffness are required. It’s widely used for pre-production prototypes since it has excellent dimensional stability and is easy to paint and glue. Acetal Delrin 570 is a homopolymer acetal containing 20% glass fiber filler. It has very high stiffness, low warpage, and low creep for superior performance at elevated temperatures. CPVC CPVC, also known as Chlorinated Polyvinyl Chloride provides excellent corrosion resistance at elev...

sections.heading: More Machining Materials Available Through the Network
sections.text: More Machining Materials Available Through the Network Not seeing the material you’re looking for? We have added 24 new options available through the Protolabs Network. Browse Materials

sections.heading: Factory vs. Network
sections.text: Factory vs. Network We offer a range of capabilities through our in-house digital factories at Protolabs along with our digital network of manufacturers. If speed is essential, our factory capabilities have you covered, but if you're in need of advanced capabilities and have more flexibility in your schedule, try Protolabs Network. CNC Milling CNC Turning chevron_left chevron_right Factory Capabilities for CNC Milling Network Capabilities for CNC Milling Maximum Part Size 22 in. x 14 in. x 3.75 in. (559mm x 356mm x 95.3mm) 25.5 in. x 25.5 in. x 11.8 in. (650mm x 650mm x 300mm) Minimum Part Size 0.25 in. x 0.25 in x .0.04 in.(6.35mm x 6.35mm x 1.016mm) 0.0393 in. x 0.0393 in. x 0.0393 in.(1m...

sections.heading: Surface Finish and Post-Processing Options
sections.text: Surface Finish and Post-Processing Options Protolabs offers a variety of CNC machining surface finishing options to meet your part requirements. More advanced coating and plating options are also available. Surface Finish Options Edges broken with tool marks visible Edges broken with light bead blasting Sharp edges (tool marks visible) Coating and Plating Options Anodizing Chromate coating Powder coating Zinc coating Nickle plating Learn more about post-processing options for CNC machining

sections.heading: Why Choose Us for Custom CNC Machining?
sections.text: Why Choose Us for Custom CNC Machining?

sections.heading: Fast and Reliable Delivery
sections.text: Fast and Reliable Delivery Iterate part designs quickly and accelerate product development with quick-turn parts delivered on time and to spec, every time.

sections.heading: Manufacturing Analysis and Online Quotes
sections.text: Manufacturing Analysis and Online Quotes When you upload your 3D CAD file to request a quote, our automated design analysis identifies any features that may be difficult to machine such as tall, thin walls or holes that cannot be threaded, to save you from costly reworks further down the product development cycle.

text_excerpt: Online CNC Machining Service | Get a Quote We value your privacy We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies. Change Preferences Allow All Change Consent Preferences We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below. The cookies that are classified as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site.... Show more Necessary Always Active Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data. Cookie _dd_s Duration 1 year Description Datadog cookie used to group all events generated from a unique user session across multiple pages. Cookie fs_lua Duration 1 hour Description This cookie is set by Fullstory, and it captures the timestamp of the last user action to manage session lifecycle.
